overall.description: A cinematic game engine sequence showing a large bird of prey flying over rolling green farmland and rural settlements. The camera follows the bird from behind as it soars above grassy hills, wooden farmsteads, and railway tracks under a bright partly cloudy sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: open rolling grassland with scattered trees and rocky outcrops

agents.ego_description: large bird of prey gliding steadily over open grassland with wings fully extended

entered.detail: expansive green rolling terrain stretching to the horizon
solitary trees dotting the landscape with green canopies
rocky formations visible on the hillside
narrow dirt path winding through the grass

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with a bird flying over expansive rolling grasslands dotted with scattered oak trees and dirt trails. The landscape is wide open under a partly cloudy sky, showing natural rural terrain with rocky outcrops visible in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: rural farmstead with wooden buildings and small pond

events.description: wooden farmstead buildings and a small pond come into view as the bird approaches the settlement
bird banks sharply left while flying over the farm buildings, altering flight direction

agents.ego_description: bird banking left and circling over the farmstead area, maintaining altitude above the buildings

entered.detail: traditional wooden farmhouses with dark roofs and weathered walls
small body of water reflecting the sky near the farm
agricultural fields with tilled brown earth
wider dirt track leading to the farm buildings

segments.scene_description: The bird approaches a rural farmstead with traditional wooden buildings and a small pond. The terrain shifts from open grassland to agricultural land with plowed fields. The bird banks sharply left, altering its flight path to circle over the farm buildings and dirt roads.

scene_state.functional_zone: farmland with railway tracks and scattered barns

events.description: railway tracks become visible cutting through the green landscape
bird banks left again while crossing over the railway line and adjacent farm buildings

agents.ego_description: bird continuing flight over railway tracks and open farmland, maintaining steady altitude

entered.detail: metal railway line cutting through the grass with gravel bed
large wooden barn structure with weathered planks
narrow waterway winding through the distant hills

segments.scene_description: The bird flies over a railway line cutting through the farmland, with additional wooden barns visible on the right. The landscape features a winding stream valley in the distance. The bird maintains altitude while banking left to follow the terrain, crossing over the railway tracks.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement behind a bird of prey as it transitions from expansive wild grasslands to a structured rural agricultural landscape. It begins by soaring over rolling green hills dotted with scattered oak trees and rocky outcrops under a partly cloudy sky. As the bird approaches a rural farmstead, the open terrain shifts into plowed agricultural fields and wooden buildings, prompting the camera to bank sharply left to circle the farm and its small pond. The scene then expands to reveal a railway line cutting through the farmland and additional wooden barns before the bird banks again to follow the contours of a winding stream valley in the distance.
